'''Dyoh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]].

==Biography==
Dyoh was present when a party was held for the arrival of the representatives of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]]. She was accompanied by a male Human.

==Appearances==
